docs.text: Kafka is a distributed log with partitions and consumer groups for horizontal scaling
Kafka consumer group rebalance reassigns partitions when workers join or leave
Kafka has no native delay queue so staged retry topics simulate delayed redelivery
Redis token bucket rate limiting uses a Lua script for atomic read modify write
Redis distributed lock and idempotency key with TTL prevent duplicate processing
Redis single threaded execution makes a whole Lua script atomic without extra locks
MySQL compare and swap status transition uses update where id and status equals expected
MySQL counter columns track subtask done and failed for O(1) progress aggregation
MongoDB stores run trace events one document per event indexed by traceId and timestamp
MongoDB nested json trace avoids joins and is retrieved whole by traceId for replay
pgvector stores embeddings and does approximate nearest neighbor cosine search
pgvector cosine distance operator orders documents by semantic similarity to a query
The LLM gateway routes models applies token bucket rate limit and records token usage
AgentContext trims history and truncates long input to a token budget preventing context bloat
Banana smoothie recipe with yogurt honey and frozen fruit blended in the kitchen
A hiking trail through the mountain forest with a river crossing and scenic viewpoints
